Request to update a custom evaluation in the catalog.

instructions.description: Instructions sent to the LLM evaluator.

name.description: Display name of the custom evaluation.

safe.description: Description of what counts as safe.

shouldIncludeSystemPrompt.description: Whether to include the system prompt in the LLM input.

updateMask.description: Comma-separated list of field paths to update. When provided, only the listed fields are touched; a listed field that is absent from the request body is cleared. When omitted, only fields present in the body are updated.

violates.description: Description of what counts as violating the policy.

get.description: Returns the count of AI applications grouped by evaluation type.

parameters.description: Number of items per page. Default 200 if omitted.

parameters.description: Zero-based page offset. Default 0 if omitted.

post.description: Creates a new AI evaluation for an application.

schema.description: Request to create a new AI evaluation.

application.description: Name of the AI application this evaluation belongs to.

isEnabled.description: Whether the evaluation should start active.

threshold.description: Score threshold. Must be between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.

get.description: Gets an AI evaluation by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the AI evaluation.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the AI evaluation.

delete.description: Deletes an AI evaluation by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the AI evaluation to delete.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the AI evaluation to delete.

patch.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing AI evaluation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the AI evaluation to update.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the AI evaluation to update.
Request to update an existing AI evaluation.

application.description: Name of the AI application this evaluation belongs to.

threshold.description: Score threshold. Must be between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.

updateMask.description: Comma-separated list of field paths to update. When provided, only the listed fields are touched; a listed field that is absent from the request body is cleared. When omitted, only fields present in the body are updated.

AiEvaluation.description: A configured AI evaluation that runs against an AI application's spans.

application.description: Name of the AI application this evaluation belongs to.

createdAt.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the evaluation was created.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this evaluation. Set automatically by the server from the authenticated identity; not provided by the client.

id.description: Unique identifier of the AI evaluation.

isEnabled.description: Whether the evaluation is currently active.

threshold.description: Score threshold. Must be between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.

updatedAt.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the evaluation was last updated.

CountAiAppsPerEvalTypeResponse.description: Response containing counts of AI applications per evaluation type.

counts.description: Map of evaluation-type name to count of AI applications using it.

CreateAiEvaluationResponse.description: Response returned after creating an AI evaluation.

CreateCustomEvaluationResponse.description: Response returned after creating a custom evaluation.

CustomEvaluation.description: A custom evaluation defined in the catalog.

applicationIds.description: IDs of AI applications this custom evaluation is linked to.

items.description: IDs of AI applications this custom evaluation is linked to.

id.description: Unique identifier of the custom evaluation.

name.description: Display name of the custom evaluation.

CustomEvaluationConfig.description: Custom evaluation policy details (instructions + examples for the LLM evaluator).

instructions.description: Instructions sent to the LLM evaluator.

safe.description: Description of what counts as safe.

shouldIncludeSystemPrompt.description: Whether to include the system prompt in the LLM input.

violates.description: Description of what counts as violating the policy.

CustomEvaluationExample.description: A single labeled example for a custom evaluation.

DeleteAiEvaluationResponse.description: Response returned after deleting an AI evaluation.

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted AI evaluation.

DeleteCustomEvaluationResponse.description: Response returned after deleting a custom evaluation.

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted custom evaluation.

EvaluationConfig.description: Type-specific configuration for an evaluation. Exactly one variant is set.

EvaluationTarget.description: Target span content the evaluation runs against: PROMPT, RESPONSE, or CONVERSATION.

FilterPathAndValues.title: FilterPathAndValues
FilterPathAndValues.description: This data structure represents a filter path and values

Filters.title: Filters
Filters.description: This data structure represents a filter

GetAiEvaluationResponse.description: Response containing the requested AI evaluation.

GetCustomEvaluationsResponse.description: Response containing the custom evaluations in the catalog.

items.description: The custom evaluations in the catalog.

HallucinationCompletenessConfig.description: Configuration for the HallucinationCompleteness evaluation (no fields).

HallucinationContextAdherenceConfig.description: Configuration for the HallucinationContextAdherence evaluation (no fields).

HallucinationContextRelevanceConfig.description: Configuration for the HallucinationContextRelevance evaluation (no fields).

HallucinationCorrectnessConfig.description: Configuration for the HallucinationCorrectness evaluation (no fields).

HallucinationTaskAdherenceConfig.description: Configuration for the HallucinationTaskAdherence evaluation (no fields).

LanguageMismatchConfig.description: Configuration for the LanguageMismatch evaluation (no fields).

applicationId.description: Unique identifier of the AI application that was linked.

id.description: Unique identifier of the custom evaluation.

ListAiEvaluationsResponse.description: Response containing a page of AI evaluations.

aiEvaluations.description: The list of AI evaluations on this page.

ListCustomEvaluationsForApplicationRespo.description: Response containing custom evaluations linked to the application.

items.description: Custom evaluations linked to the application.

additionalContext.description: Additional context passed to the LLM evaluator.

SexismConfig.description: Configuration for the Sexism evaluation (no fields).

tables.description: SQL table names that are allowed.

items.description: SQL table names that are allowed.

SqlHallucinationConfig.description: Configuration for the SqlHallucination evaluation (no fields).

SqlLoadConfig.description: Configuration for the SqlLoad evaluation: caps on query complexity.

cteLimit.description: Maximum CTEs allowed in a query.

joinLimit.description: Maximum JOINs allowed in a query.

SqlReadOnlyConfig.description: Configuration for the SqlReadOnly evaluation (no fields).

tables.description: SQL table names that are not allowed.

items.description: SQL table names that are not allowed.

ToxicityConfig.description: Configuration for the Toxicity evaluation (no fields).

applicationId.description: Unique identifier of the AI application that was unlinked.

id.description: Unique identifier of the custom evaluation.

UpdateAiEvaluationResponse.description: Response returned after updating an AI evaluation.

UpdateCustomEvaluationResponse.description: Response returned after updating a custom evaluation.
